ham.subject: Ticket #9876 Resolved: Feature X Implemented
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I hope you are doing well. I'm writing to inform you that the Jira ticket #9876 has been successfully resolved. The feature X has been implemented, tested, and merged into the main branch. You can review the changes in the PR at <URL> and run the integration tests. Please let me know if you encounter any issues or need further adjustments.

Thanks and best regards,
Anita Sharma
Software Engineer

spam.subject: Ticket ID: 54321 - Urgent: System Access Issue
spam.body:
Hello,

We have received a ticket from your department regarding the 'System Access Issue' with Ticket ID: 54321. Our IT helpdesk team has reviewed the details and requires immediate action. Please provide the following information to expedite the resolution:
- Full name
- Department
- Exact error message
- Screenshot (if possible)

Failure to comply within 24 hours may result in temporary suspension of your account. Kindly reply to this email or click <URL> to confirm your details.

Thank you,
IT Support Team
